rulings.Case Title: CARSWELL VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. COMPLAINT DOES NOT FACIALLY DISCLOSE THAT ACTION IS TIME BARRED. IMPROPER TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF DEFENDANT'S MAILING PRACTICES ON DEMURRER. SEE DE CRUZ V. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES, (1995) 173 CAL.APP.3D 1131. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: CARSWELL VS CCSF
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of A Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs Anita Gabrille And Joshua Brandon Trentor And Plaintiffs' Counsel Christine Garcia By Defendant Ccsf

rulings.Case Title: MAIN STREET MEDIA, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. KEEN.COM, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION [RECISSION] - SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO NAME MINORITY SHAREHOLDER. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION [FRAUD], 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION [VIOLATION OF CORP. CODE] - OVERRULED. STATEMENTS NOT MERE PUFFERY. MISREPRESENTATIONS PLEADED WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. ARTICLE VIII, PARAGRAPH 8.4 & ARTICLE VII, PARAGRAPH 7.1 DO NOT BAR CLAIM. SEE RON GREENSPAN VOLKSWAGEN V. FORD MOTOR LAND DEV. CORP., (1995) 32 CAL.APP.4TH 985. ARTICLE III PARAGRAPH 3.9(A) MAY BAR RELIANCE ON SOME OF THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS UNDER BANCO CO BRASIL V. LATIAN, INC., (1991) 234 CAL.APP.3D 973, 1009. NEVERTHELESS, NOT ALL OF THE ALLEGED MISREPRESENTATIONS ARE COVERED BY THE CONTRACT. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF CONTRACT UNDER ASCHERMAN V. GENERAL REINSURANCE GROUP, (1986) 183 CAL.APP.3D 307, 310. (PB)
